---
description: "Generate genuinely new Mu3Library package directions and a concept brief when you are stuck or the next direction is unclear."
name: "개발 아이디어 크리에이터"
argument-hint: "Describe the package area, audience, or future direction you want ideas for. Leave it broad if you want repository-wide whitespace discovery"
agent: "agent"
---

Produce a Mu3Library ideation brief for the described area.

- Use the `development-idea-creator` skill.
- Keep the work in pre-unit concept shaping only.
- Default to new package directions, workflow multipliers, or ecosystem bridges rather than incremental refinements.
- If the request starts from one pain point or one existing feature, widen one hop to adjacent workflows before ranking ideas.
- Start from repository evidence that explains the current package intent, then build a capability map and whitespace map before proposing ideas.
- Use limited web research only after the whitespace map exists; repository constraints win.
- Generate 5 distinct ranked ideas across different buckets and explain why each is not just a minor improvement of an existing feature.
- Rank the ideas using novelty, package fit, leverage, feasibility, and risk.
- Write a concept brief for the top idea.
- Do not produce execution sequencing or final owner selection.
